title: SasquatchMike's Builder's Delight
description: A mod that simply adds new building blocks
body:
Builder's Delight is a decorative mod that adds in many new building blocks for players to toy around with. Every wondered why blocks seemingly have no parity or consistency among themselves? Yeah, me too. That is exactly what this mod aims to fix!

Ever wanted Terracotta walls? We got 'em!
Ever wanted Stone Pillars? We got 'em!
Ever wanted Concrete Stairs? We got 'em!
Whatever your little builder heart yearns for, we have or will happily accept suggestions for!

Made with MCreator!
